generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System sensor for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSSensorData
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for controlling HVAC systems"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building Control System controller managing sensor and actuator interactions"
]

instance BCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSSensorDataPoint : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataIntegrationEnabler
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into successful deployment of Digital Twin artifacts"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights on building operational status for AECO stakeholders"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights on potential failures and maintenance needs"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation insights for scenario-based building performance evaluation"
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analysis insights for system optimization"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy optimization insights for cost reduction"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision support insights for facility management and engineering decisions"
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated deployment service for Digital Twin artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing operational insights for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for forecasting maintenance needs and performance issues"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for modeling building performance under various scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis service for evaluating building system performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for enhancing energy efficiency and operational costs"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support service for facility managers and engineers"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance MDEProcess : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process transforming enriched BIM models into structured DT artifacts for automated deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance DataIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified semantic foundation for consistent data integration from physical infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points enabling scalability and integration of custom services"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric models from BIM enriched with behavioral representations of Building Control System components including sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEProcess
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataIntegrationEnabler
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure environment supporting multiple digital twin instances for scalability across components to entire systems"
    base:contains BCSSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts for monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework acting as a hub for bidirectional data exchange, coordinating specialized roles (Building Control Engineers for device modeling, Facility Managers for monitoring/control, DT Engineers for service integration) and modular components with standardized extension points for custom service integration, enabling holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environment (defining sensors, actuators, and controllers), Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate structured representations and deployable artifacts, real-time data synchronization between physical and digital systems, interactive visualization for monitoring and control operations, and modular extension via custom services. Governance is managed by stakeholder roles: Building Control Engineers initiate deployment, Facility Managers monitor system states, and DT Engineers develop and integrate custom services."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems via standardized extension points and BIM model integration, with non-functional requirements addressing system-wide interoperability but no specific data exchange protocols or standards detailed in the documents."
]
